title: Moroccan Tagine with Refried Beans
description: A hearty and flavorful Moroccan-inspired stew made with refried beans, fragrant spices, and tender gorgeous chicken. Serve with crusty bread for a satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: Moroccan Spices
ingredients.notes: a blend of cumin, coriander, and cinnamon

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the Moroccan spices, cumin, salt, and pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the refried beans, stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
